base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of scorpion_variants — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Scorpion — 3 palette variants (gray/pink/yellow). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Scorpion — 3 palette variants (gray/pink/yellow); pincer-claws + poison sting
